mappings.rationaleAI: Molecular-level vital processes are the mechanistic basis of life covered in this article.
Vital processes at the molecular level, including DNA replication and protein synthesis, occur within the cellular context.
Molecular biology investigates vital processes at the molecular level as covered in this section.
Gene expression involves vital molecular processes including transcription and translation.
Proteins perform vital processes at the molecular level including catalysis and signaling.
Enzymatic catalysis drives vital processes at the molecular level in living organisms.
